name: scan
description: Run a full AI supply chain security scan — discovers MCP agents, scans all packages for CVEs, maps blast radius, returns findings with EPSS scores and remediation plan.

arguments.name: project_path
arguments.desc: Directory to scan for MCP agent configs (default: auto-detect)

arguments.name: fail_on_severity
arguments.desc: Exit non-zero if findings at this severity or above: critical, high, medium, low

arguments.name: output_format
arguments.desc: Output format: json, cyclonedx, spdx, sarif, html (default: json)

arguments.name: transitive
arguments.desc: Resolve transitive dependencies for npm/pypi/go packages

name: check
description: Check a specific package for known CVEs before installing — pre-install gate.

arguments.name: package
arguments.desc: Package name and version, e.g. 'flask@2.0.0' or 'lodash@4.17.20'

arguments.name: ecosystem
arguments.desc: Package ecosystem: pypi, npm, cargo, go, maven, nuget, hex, pub, rubygems

name: intel_lookup
description: Look up a CVE, GHSA, or OSV advisory in the local threat-intel database.

arguments.name: advisory_id
arguments.desc: Advisory identifier such as CVE-2026-12345 or GHSA-abcd-1234-wxyz

name: intel_match
description: Match package or purl inventory coordinates against local threat-intel advisories.

arguments.name: packages
arguments.desc: Package coordinates with purl or ecosystem/name/version fields

name: intel_sources
description: List configured threat-intel sources and local feed freshness metadata.

name: intel_daily_brief
description: Return a local analyst threat brief from governed intel sources.

arguments.name: packages
arguments.desc: Optional package coordinates with purl or ecosystem/name/version fields

arguments.name: epss_threshold
arguments.desc: Minimum EPSS probability for high-EPSS inventory matches

arguments.name: kev_window_hours
arguments.desc: Lookback window for recent KEV additions

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum advisories to return per section

name: blast_radius
description: Look up the blast radius of a specific CVE — shows which agents, credentials, and tools are affected.

name: exposure_paths
description: Return ranked ExposurePath JSON from the graph store for headless security agents.

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant ID for the graph snapshot (default: default)

arguments.name: scan_id
arguments.desc: Optional graph scan ID; omit to use latest snapshot

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum ranked exposure paths to return (1-100)

arguments.name: min_risk
arguments.desc: Minimum path risk score to include (0-100)

name: should_i_deploy
description: Return allow/warn/block deployment guidance from ExposurePath risk.

arguments.name: candidate
arguments.desc: Package, resource, CVE, node ID, or deployment label to evaluate

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant ID for the graph snapshot (default: default)

arguments.name: scan_id
arguments.desc: Optional graph scan ID; omit to use latest snapshot

arguments.name: limit
arguments.desc: Maximum matched exposure paths to return (1-25)

name: policy_check
description: Evaluate a security policy against current scan results — returns pass/fail per rule.

arguments.name: scan_results
arguments.desc: Path to scan results JSON (uses last scan if omitted)

name: registry_lookup
description: Query the agent-bom MCP server threat intelligence registry for a server's risk level, credential heuristics, and verification status.

arguments.name: server_name
arguments.desc: MCP server package name or identifier

name: generate_sbom
description: Generate a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) for your AI agent setup in CycloneDX or SPDX format.

name: compliance
description: Get compliance posture for OWASP LLM Top 10, MITRE ATLAS, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act, SOC 2, ISO 27001, CMMC, FedRAMP, and more.

arguments.name: framework
arguments.desc: Framework: owasp_llm, mitre_atlas, nist_ai_rmf, eu_ai_act, soc2, iso_27001, cmmc, fedramp, nist_csf, aisvs

arguments.name: scan_results
arguments.desc: Path to scan results JSON (uses last scan if omitted)

name: remediate
description: Generate a remediation plan — ordered upgrade recommendations that clear the most vulnerabilities per change.

arguments.name: scan_results
arguments.desc: Path to scan results JSON (uses last scan if omitted)

arguments.name: output_path
arguments.desc: Write plan to this file path (optional)

name: skill_scan
description: Scan instruction files such as CLAUDE.md, AGENTS.md, .cursorrules, and skills/*.md for package refs, MCP servers, trust verdicts, and findings.

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Path to a skill/instruction file or directory to scan

name: skill_verify
description: Verify Sigstore provenance for instruction and skill files.

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Path to a skill/instruction file or directory to verify

name: skill_trust
description: Assess the trust level of a SKILL (AI agent skill/extension) — checks provenance, permissions, and risk.

arguments.name: skill_path
arguments.desc: Path to SKILL.md or skill directory

name: verify
description: Verify package integrity and SLSA provenance against registries.

name: where
description: Show all MCP discovery paths and which config files exist on this system.

name: tool_risk_assessment
description: Score live-introspected MCP tool capabilities and server risk — classifies tools as READ/WRITE/EXECUTE/NETWORK/FILE_ACCESS and flags dangerous capability combinations.

arguments.name: config_path
arguments.desc: Path to MCP client config directory (default: auto-discover)

name: inventory
description: List all discovered MCP configurations and servers without running a CVE scan.

name: diff
description: Compare a fresh scan against a baseline to find new and resolved vulnerabilities.

arguments.name: baseline_path
arguments.desc: Path to baseline scan results JSON

arguments.name: current_path
arguments.desc: Path to current scan results JSON (runs fresh scan if omitted)

name: marketplace_check
description: Pre-install trust check for an MCP server package — verifies before adding to your agent config.

name: code_scan
description: Run SAST (Static Application Security Testing) on source code via Semgrep.

arguments.name: severity
arguments.desc: Minimum severity to report: critical, high, medium, low

name: context_graph
description: Build an agent context graph with lateral movement analysis — visualizes agent-to-agent trust chains.

name: graph_export
description: Export the agent dependency graph in graph-native formats for visualization or downstream graph analysis.

arguments.name: config_path
arguments.desc: Path to MCP config directory (default: auto-discover)

arguments.name: format
arguments.desc: Export format: json (default), graphml, cypher, dot, mermaid

name: analytics_query
description: Query vulnerability trends, posture history, and runtime event summaries from Claude Desktop's local analytics.

arguments.name: query_type
arguments.desc: Query type: trends, history, events, summary

name: cis_benchmark
description: Run CIS benchmark checks against a cloud account (AWS, Azure, GCP, Snowflake, Databricks).

arguments.name: provider
arguments.desc: Cloud provider: aws, azure, gcp, snowflake, databricks

name: fleet_scan
description: Batch-scan a list of MCP server names against the security metadata registry.

arguments.name: servers
arguments.desc: List of MCP server package names to scan

name: runtime_correlate
description: Cross-reference vulnerability scan results with proxy runtime audit logs to find exploited CVEs.

name: runtime_production_index
description: Return metadata-only runtime production posture for proxy and gateway traffic.

name: runtime_blueprints
description: Return canonical runtime role/profile blueprints for agent and MCP governance.

arguments.name: blueprint_id
arguments.desc: Optional blueprint id such as developer or security_analyst

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant scope for the response envelope

name: runtime_blueprint_drift
description: Evaluate live runtime posture against a role/profile blueprint.

arguments.name: blueprint_id
arguments.desc: Blueprint id such as developer or security_analyst

name: cost_report
description: Return LLM spend attribution per agent/model/provider with budget posture, from OTel GenAI token usage.

arguments.name: agent
arguments.desc: Optional agent name to scope spend to a single agent

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant scope (defaults to the control-plane default tenant)

name: anomaly_scan
description: Detect cost and behavior anomalies (per-agent spend + per-session call-rate z-score outliers).

name: drift_incidents
description: List open blueprint-drift incidents where observed runtime traffic left the approved role blueprint.

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant scope (defaults to the control-plane default tenant)

name: proxy_status
description: Return current MCP proxy metrics and runtime alert posture.

name: proxy_alerts
description: Return recent tenant-scoped runtime proxy alerts with severity and detector filters.

name: gateway_status
description: Return gateway policy and inter-agent firewall runtime statistics.

name: shield_status
description: Return Shield session status without changing enforcement state.

name: shield_start
description: Start Shield enforcement for a session; requires admin role and an audit reason.

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

name: shield_unblock
description: Unblock Shield enforcement for a session; requires admin role and an audit reason.

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

name: shield_break_glass
description: Emergency Shield override; requires admin role and an audit reason.

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the emergency override

name: firewall_check
description: Dry-run an inter-agent firewall decision without recording control-plane state.

name: audit_query
description: Read tenant-scoped control-plane audit records with filters.

name: audit_integrity
description: Verify control-plane and runtime audit-chain integrity.

arguments.name: include_runtime
arguments.desc: Include configured runtime proxy audit log

name: vector_db_scan
description: Scan for running vector databases and assess their security posture (auth, encryption, exposure).

name: aisvs_benchmark
description: Run AISVS v1 (AI Security Verification Standard) benchmark against your AI infrastructure.

name: gpu_infra_scan
description: Discover GPU/AI compute infrastructure: containers, K8s nodes, and DCGM endpoints.

name: dataset_card_scan
description: Scan a directory for ML dataset card metadata and provenance — checks for license and sourcing issues.

name: training_pipeline_scan
description: Scan a directory for ML training pipeline lineage and provenance artifacts.

name: browser_extension_scan
description: Scan installed browser extensions for dangerous permissions and supply chain risk.

arguments.name: browser
arguments.desc: Browser to scan: chrome, firefox, edge (default: all detected)

name: model_provenance_scan
description: Check ML model provenance and supply chain metadata — verifies model cards and source integrity.

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Directory containing model files or model card

name: prompt_scan
description: Scan prompt template files for injection risks and security issues.

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Directory or file containing prompt templates

name: model_file_scan
description: Scan a directory for ML model files and assess serialization risks (pickle, safetensors, GGUF).

arguments.name: path
arguments.desc: Directory to scan for model files

name: ai_inventory_scan
description: Scan source code for AI component usage patterns — identifies LLM calls, embedding models, and vector DB usage.

name: license_compliance_scan
description: Evaluate package licenses against compliance policy — flags GPL, AGPL, or other restricted licenses.

name: ingest_external_scan
description: Ingest external scanner JSON output and return packages with blast radius analysis.

arguments.name: scan_file
arguments.desc: Path to external scanner JSON output file

arguments.name: format
arguments.desc: Scanner format: trivy, grype, syft (auto-detected if omitted)

name: identity_issue
description: Issue a managed agent identity; requires admin role, identity:write scope, and an audit reason. Returns the raw token once.

arguments.name: agent_id
arguments.desc: Agent identifier the issued identity represents

arguments.name: role
arguments.desc: Identity role label, for example agent or service

arguments.name: blueprint_id
arguments.desc: Optional runtime blueprint id bound to the identity

arguments.name: allowed_tools
arguments.desc: Comma-separated per-tool scope allowlist; empty means any tool

arguments.name: operator_scopes
arguments.desc: Comma-separated operator scopes; must include identity:write

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

arguments.name: tenant_id
arguments.desc: Tenant scope for the identity and audit logging

name: identity_rotate
description: Rotate a managed agent identity with an overlap window; requires admin role, identity:write scope, and an audit reason.

arguments.name: overlap_seconds
arguments.desc: Seconds the old token stays live during rotation

arguments.name: ttl_seconds
arguments.desc: Lifetime of the replacement identity in seconds

arguments.name: operator_scopes
arguments.desc: Comma-separated operator scopes; must include identity:write

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

name: identity_revoke
description: Revoke a managed agent identity immediately; requires admin role, identity:write scope, and an audit reason.

arguments.name: operator_scopes
arguments.desc: Comma-separated operator scopes; must include identity:write

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

name: identity_grant_jit
description: Grant an identity time-bound JIT access to one tool; requires admin role, identity:write scope, and an audit reason.

arguments.name: identity_id
arguments.desc: Identity id to grant time-bound access to

arguments.name: tool_name
arguments.desc: Tool the grant authorizes beyond the identity's standing scope

arguments.name: operator_scopes
arguments.desc: Comma-separated operator scopes; must include identity:write

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action

name: identity_revoke_jit
description: Revoke an active JIT access grant immediately; requires admin role, identity:write scope, and an audit reason.

arguments.name: operator_scopes
arguments.desc: Comma-separated operator scopes; must include identity:write

arguments.name: reason
arguments.desc: Audit reason for the write action
